title: UUIDView
description: UUIDView is a small plugin that adds the ability to find out the player's UUID
body:
# UUIDView
 
UUIDView is a small plugin that adds the ability to find out the player's UUID

![UUIDView_Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8413602b50ed5d1c6a2d06804ccbcf1480d45d79.png)
## Commands
- `/uuidview get [player_name]` - Get UUID online player
- `/uuidview off [player_name]` - Get UUID offline player
- `/uuidview reload` - Reload plugin configuration

## Permissions
- `uuidview.use` - Permission for using this plugin
- `uuidview.reload` - Permission for reload this plugin

## Config Example
<details>
<summary>config.yml</summary>


```yaml
message-no-permission: "§cYou do not have permission to do this."
message-uuid: "§7%nickname% UUID: §6%uuid%"
message-not-player: "§cPlayer not found."
specify-player: "§cPlease specify a player name."
config-reloaded: "§2Config successfully reloaded."
command-usage: "§cUsage: /uuidview <command> <arg>"
```


</details>
